evidence_excerpt: Repeat imaging and endoscopic exams showed him to be free of recurrence 11 months postsurgery, and he remains so 3.5 years postsurgery. Mild postoperative diplopia resolved; no epiphora, CSF leak, or vision loss.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Disease-free at 11 months and remains so at 3.5 years postsurgery; no persistent symptoms or complications described.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Mild postoperative diplopia resolved with the passage of time.
Repeat imaging and endoscopic exams showed him to be free of recurrence 11 months postsurgery.
He remains free of recurrence 3.5 years postsurgery.

notes_on_uncertainty: Long-term functional status and daily activity levels are not explicitly described beyond resolution of diplopia and absence of complications; conclusions about quality of life are inferred conservatively from reported clinical outcomes. The exact date of definitive diagnosis is not provided; the final pathology establishing T4N0Mx sinonasal VC was used as the diagnosis date proxy.
